text: {"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"3","subject":"Design new clean architecture with interfaces and patterns","description":"Based on the current codebase analysis, propose a new architecture for the Bitazza iOS app. Cover: module boundaries (SPM vs local packages), clean architecture layers, protocol-based DI, navigation (Coordinator/Router), networking abstraction, state management (SwiftUI @Observable vs Combine), error handling strategy, and testing architecture. Define clean interfaces between layers. Propose concrete folder structure and naming conventions.","assignedBy":"designer","timestamp":"2026-03-10T05:06:35.996Z"}
